blockedRows.reason: XR5 proves deterministic style-to-font rows, but one line still cannot switch font faces inside the same measurement request.
The one-block XR5 matrix does not impersonate the accepted Table preparation and synchronized pagination contracts.
Repeated headers require the Table page/display-list lane, not a fabricated text-block row.
Hard line breaks are covered; explicit page-break nodes remain a mixed-document composition concern.
XR5 records Node/Browser renderer-backed drift; it does not relabel that as default/approximate measurer drift.
